summary: Completed frontend testing of Personal Finance Tracker. Found critical login authentication issue preventing access to existing user accounts, but all core features work properly once authenticated via registration. Hebrew calendar, distribution mode, recurring transactions, and currency features all function correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: Login functionality completely broken - HTML hydration error prevents existing users from logging in
critical_bugs.impact: Existing users cannot access their accounts or data

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: User sessions expire frequently during normal usage, requiring re-login

ui_bugs.issue: HTML hydration error: <span> cannot be a child of <option> element in currency dropdown

integration_issues.issue: Existing user login fails silently - no error messages shown to user

passed_tests: Registration process works correctly for new users
Dashboard loads with all stat cards (Total Income, Maaser Owed, Maaser Balance, Total Given, Total Lent)
Add Transaction modal opens and displays all transaction types (Income, Give, Lend)
Hebrew calendar toggle switches between Gregorian and Hebrew modes perfectly
Hebrew date display shows correct Hebrew dates (e.g., '23rd of Nisan, 5786')
Settings dropdown opens and distribution mode can be changed
Distribution mode 'give_only' correctly hides Lend button in transaction modal
Recurring transaction checkbox and frequency selector work properly
Currency selection shows exchange rate field for non-base currencies
Maaser percentage input defaults to 10% for income transactions
All required test IDs are present and functional
Transaction type buttons (Income, Give, Lend) are clickable and responsive
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix HTML hydration error in currency dropdown (span inside option element) that's breaking the login functionality. This prevents existing users from accessing their accounts. Also investigate session management to prevent frequent logouts during normal usage.
